meaning: n.雅库特(苏联自治共和国名),雅库特人[语]
examples: The historian Yakut described it picturesquely as a "mother of castles".
In these conditions, traditional Yakut food always made use of whatever it could.
The festival was organized after proclamation of Yakut heroic epos Olonkho on November 25th 2005, as one of the Masterpieces of the Oral and Intangible Heritage of Humanity.
It should be noted that the proclamation of Yakut heroic epos "Olonkho" as masterpiece of the oral and intangible heritage of humanity represents an exceptional value for national and world culture.
